{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032208014216614D9B4BA508891BB0"}"},"total":853},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7542025556488307518","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"还可以吧，基本上能看的下去，没有什么很大的毒点，就是故事的背景设定的太过于简单，以至于读到后面，一下子就能猜的出来，然后就会丧失看下去的欲望，好多章节没有什么意思，直接跳到大结去看的，如果书荒的话推荐这本书，还是很有意思的。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1756022038,"group_id":"7449607836998323262","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"奇幻脑洞反常理，病树前头万木春","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/bnbxWuS6Gn0i79vaFGxfs=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/0099b3f2f71e4b8fab80ebcefa64a168~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776705726&x-signature=AkhcJdF2UhuP5usTYteIkQ8x6pA%3D","user_id":"574363738584932","user_name":"神灵有点神"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"574363738584932","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_1","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.1","title_id":"author_level_1"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.1","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.1"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7449607836998323262","book_info":{"abstract":"【无系统】【无女主】
患有先天疾病的陈文，一辈子都只能躺着了病床上，20岁的他，生命走到了尽头。
临走前，他看着窗外小小的世界，眼里满是向往与不甘。
等他再次醒来的时候，发现自己成了一条黑龙。
龙族强大而且寿命长，他决定这一世，他要走遍世界每一个角落。
…………
多年后。
“听说了吗？教会圣骑士军团和魔法师公会联手讨伐黑龙失败，损失惨重啊！”
“什么！有很多黑龙吗？难道龙族要卷土重来了？”
“没有没有，就只有一条黑龙。”
“一条黑龙？圣骑士军团和魔法师公会联手还能输？”
“那可不嘛！听说那条黑龙身穿御魔铠甲，手持一根狼牙大棒，都是堪比圣器的装备。”
“我怎么听说那条黑龙是使用魔法打败了圣骑士军团和魔法师公会。”
“扯吧你！黑龙又不是人，怎么会穿铠甲和拿武器，你更扯，还使用魔法！就龙族那一根筋的脑子能学得会魔法吗？”
“你还别说，那条黑龙就是人里人气的。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b62c413c109c920199b7c4d0ef904995","author":"胖胖的剑客","author_id":"","book_id":"7449607836998323262","book_name":"这条龙真的没问题吗","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202830","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"7550人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1141,"name":"西方奇幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1141&name=西方奇幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":259,"name":"奇幻仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=259&name=奇幻仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":6,"name":"奇幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=6&name=奇幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":512,"name":"异世大陆","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=512&name=异世大陆&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7449608303895642686","read_count":"7550","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1075185"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.0","serial_count":"486","tags":"西方奇幻,奇幻仙侠,奇幻,玄幻,穿越,无女主,架空,异世大陆","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/65d3bf6d028ad65b03366d53d3b757c1~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779321702&x-signature=GOhuP%2Fyx4csGCxlGW1ttfhyLe00%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"248927273368552","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"534
